## resolveCatalog() function

Build a name → component lookup map from a catalog. The renderer uses this to resolve `{ component: 'Text', ... }` from the protocol stream.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveCatalog(
  catalog: Catalog,
): ReadonlyMap<string, CatalogComponent>;
```
